prompt: Using semantic segmentation on image 1, replace the mop handle texture with image 3's screwdriver style. Apply a pattern inspired by image 2's bolts to the mop head. Change the background lighting to image 4's dark ambient mood. Re-render the circular details in image 5's sketch art style.
prompt_refined:
Edit the provided source image (image 1), which features a mop, as follows:

1.  Replace the texture and color of the mop's handle (the gray and yellow part) with the black, yellow-striped, and blue metallic aesthetic of the screwdriver handle from image 3.
2.  Incorporate a metallic, hexagonal bolt-like pattern onto the surface of the large blue mop head. The pattern should be inspired by the bolts shown in image 2.
3.  Transform the bright background of image 1 to match the dark, ambient, and low-light mood depicted in image 4.
4.  Re-render the circular graphic elements in image 1—specifically the "Swiveling Head" ring around the mop connection point and the smaller circular inset displaying the mop head texture—in the hand-drawn, colored pencil sketch art style of image 5.
objects: Mop handle with black, yellow-striped, and blue metallic aesthetic
Large blue mop head with metallic, hexagonal bolt-like pattern
"Swiveling Head" ring in hand-drawn, colored pencil sketch art style
Smaller circular inset displaying mop head texture and "USE WET OR DRY!" text in hand-drawn, colored pencil sketch art style
Oval graphic with "Cleans: Dirt Scuff Marks Grease Pet Hair Spills and More!" text
Text "Special looped microfiber cleans faster, easier, better... with less effort!"
